privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the standard Muncie example dataset provided by USACE HEC-RAS 6.6. Based on an independent audit of the 'Muncie.p04.tmp.hdf' file (which contains 61 cross sections), the implied length calculated from River Station IDs consistently matches the stored 'Len Channel' with sub-inch accuracy. The maximum discrepancy is approximately 0.011 ft at River Station 10216.27. Therefore, given the 1.0 ft tolerance specified, there are 0 failing sections. A correct agent script will generate an audit_summary.txt stating there are 0 failing sections and the maximum discrepancy occurs at River Station 10216.27.
